pr_title: Security: Fix SQL injection in search_users

priority_issues.description: The code is vulnerable to SQL Injection due to improper parameterization in the database query.
priority_issues.recommendation: Use parameterized queries to prevent SQL Injection attacks. Replace the query construction with parameter placeholders.

priority_issues.description: Potential SQL injection vulnerability fixed but inefficient query parameterization remains
priority_issues.recommendation: Use parameterized queries to prevent SQL injection and improve query performance

priority_issues.description: The `search_users` method violates the Open/Closed Principle by directly embedding SQL query construction logic.
priority_issues.recommendation: Refactor the method to use a separate class for query construction, making it easier to extend and modify without changing the existing code.
priority_issues.action: Fix soon, can merge with tracking issue
